indicators.name: open floor space
indicators.rationale: The open floor space allows for movement without obstruction.

indicators.name: chairs and couches
indicators.rationale: Chairs and couches obstruct the open floor space and create visual clutter.

indicators.name: curtains
indicators.rationale: Curtains block light and create visual clutter.

indicators.name: light fixtures
indicators.rationale: Light fixtures provide ambient lighting, but do not obstruct the open floor space.

reasoning_summary: The open floor space and light fixtures support yoga and stretching, while the chairs and curtains create visual clutter and obstruction. A score of 4 reflects the mixed support for the activity due to the presence of chairs and curtains.
